svg.title: Backend architecture overview
svg.desc: Structural diagram showing the mobile app, API gateway, core services, databases, and external dispatch targets

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What APIs does the mobile app call on the backend?')
sendPrompt('What does the API gateway do in this backend?')
sendPrompt('What does the Ride service do?')
sendPrompt('What does the Crash detection service do?')
sendPrompt('What does the User service store and manage?')
sendPrompt('What goes in the Ride sessions database?')
sendPrompt('What databases does the Crash service use?')
sendPrompt('How is medical data stored securely?')
sendPrompt('Why use a message queue for crash alerts?')
sendPrompt('How does the notification service dispatch alerts to hospitals and police?')
sendPrompt('What does the Geolocation service do?')
